## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues with "Fixes #123" / "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contribution Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [AI and Automated Contribution Policy](../AI_POLICY.md).
- [ ] The change is focused on a single concern (no unrelated refactors or formatting noise).
- [ ] Tests for the change have been added or updated, and `hatch run test:test` passes locally (or a faster subset like `hatch run test.rf74:test` during iteration).
- [ ] `hatch run lint:all` passes.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where relevant (user docs, code comments, README).
- [ ] Generated files (if any) were regenerated with the documented script, not edited by hand.
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages) and are [signed](../CONTRIBUTING.md#signed-commits-required).

## AI / tooling disclosure

<!--
If AI tools or automated agents were used to create a substantial part of this PR,
disclose that here (tool name is enough). Trivial autocomplete or grammar help does
not need to be disclosed. See AI_POLICY.md for details.
-->

- [ ] No AI/automation was used beyond ordinary editor autocomplete.
- [ ] AI/automation was used; tool(s): <!-- e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude, ... -->
  - [ ] I reviewed the generated output manually, understand it, and verified it locally.

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay attention to: tradeoffs, alternatives considered, follow-ups. -->
